Quality Education.reason: Focus on Korean language teaching methods aligns with Target 4.1 ('ensure quality education').
The course's core purpose is teacher training, aiming to 'cultivate professional Korean language education talents,' directly supporting quality education and teacher supply (Targets 4.1, 4.4, 4.c).
evidence: 積極培育具備專業素養之韓語教育人才 (actively cultivate professional Korean language education talents)
韓文教材教法 (Teaching Methods and Materials of Korean)
為未來從事韓語教育奠定堅實基礎 (lay a solid foundation for future careers in Korean language education)

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Prepares students with professional skills 'for future careers in Korean language education,' directly contributing to productive employment and decent work as per Target 8.5.
evidence: 為未來從事韓語教育奠定堅實基礎 (for future careers in Korean language education)
積極培育具備專業素養之韓語教育人才 (actively cultivate professional Korean language education talents)
為未來就業或升學奠定實務基礎 (lay a solid foundation for future employment or further studies)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: By offering Korean alongside 'mainstream foreign language courses,' the course can be inferred to slightly promote educational inclusion and diversity, loosely related to Target 10.2.
evidence: 除英語、日語等主流外語課程外，亦有必要開設韓語相關課程供學生選修 (Besides mainstream foreign language courses such as English and Japanese, it is also necessary to offer Korean-related courses)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Involves partnerships through 'educational internships in high schools' and collaborative projects, building capacity to achieve educational goals, which aligns with Targets 17.9 and 17.17.
evidence: 赴高中實地試教與教育實習 (Conduct trial teaching and educational internships in high schools)
協同編撰韓語教學教材與學習資源 (Collaboratively compile Korean teaching materials and learning resources)
